channel.title: Webhooks on Aamu.app blog
channel.description: Recent content in Webhooks on Aamu.app blog

item.title: From form submission to follow-up: workflows with Aamu.app
item.description: How to connect Aamu Forms, Databases, Automations, Webhooks, Tasks, Emails, and CRM into practical end-to-end workflows.

item.title: Outbound webhooks in Aamu.app: real-time events for tasks, Helpdesk, email, and more
item.description: How Aamu.app outbound webhooks send signed real-time events for tasks, Helpdesk, email, forms, meetings, files, docs, databases, projects, and teams.
